standard.policy: Free cancellation up to 5 days before check-in.
standard.lateCancellation: Cancellations within 5 days of check-in incur a charge equal to the first night's stay.
standard.noShow: No-shows are charged the full booking amount.

nonRefundable.policy: Non-refundable rates are fully charged at booking and cannot be cancelled or modified.
nonRefundable.note: Non-refundable rates offer a discount of approximately 15–20% vs. standard rates.

highSeason.policy: During July and August, free cancellation is available up to 14 days before check-in.
highSeason.lateCancellation: Cancellations within 14 days during July–August incur a charge of 2 nights' stay.

payment.depositPolicy: A valid credit card is required at check-in. No charge is made at booking for standard rates.
payment.paymentAtCheckIn: The full amount is charged at check-in unless a pre-payment arrangement was made.

checkIn.earliestPossible: Depending on availability — we'll do our best to accommodate early arrivals.
checkIn.idRequired: Valid passport or ID is required for all guests at check-in.
checkIn.minAge: The main guest must be at least 18 years old.

checkOut.lateCheckoutFee: €40 for check-out between 11:00 and 13:00. After 13:00 charged as an additional night.

children.freeStay: Children 0–3 years stay free in existing bedding.
children.reducedRate: Children 4–12 years receive a 50% discount on the room rate when sharing with parents.
children.teenagersAdults: Guests 13 and above are considered adults for pricing purposes.
children.cots: Baby cots are available free of charge on request — please inform us at booking.
children.kidsClub: Free access for all hotel guests aged 3–12 years.

pets.reason: To ensure the comfort and safety of all guests, including those with allergies, we maintain a strict no-pets policy.

smoking.policy: The entire property is non-smoking, including all rooms, balconies, and indoor common areas.
smoking.smokingArea: A designated outdoor smoking area is available near the main entrance.
smoking.fee: A deep-cleaning fee of €150 applies if smoking is detected in a room.

damage.policy: Guests are responsible for any damage caused to hotel property. Charges will be applied to the credit card on file.

quietHours.policy: We kindly ask all guests to respect quiet hours for the comfort of everyone.

pools.supervision: Not a lifeguard-supervised pool. Children must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
pools.dressCode: Appropriate swimwear required. No shorts, cut-offs, or underwear in the pool.

disability.note: Please inform us of any accessibility requirements at booking.

groups.policy: Group bookings require a separate contract and deposit. Please contact our reservations team directly.

taxesAndFees.cityTax: €3.50 per person per night (Greek accommodation tax, paid at check-in, exempt for children under 12).
